testcase.name: test_get

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance(<Response [200]>, Response) + where <Response [200]> = get('10.1016/j.jns.2020.116832') + where get = <unpywall.cache.UnpywallCache object at 0x10554f150>.get

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_cache.TestUnpywallCache object at 0x10537f150> example_cache = <unpywall.cache.UnpywallCache object at 0x10294f290> backup_cache = <unpywall.cache.UnpywallCache object at 0x10554f150>
def test_get(self, example_cache, backup_cache): doi = '10.1016/j.jns.2020.116832' example_cache.delete(doi) assert doi not in example_cache.content assert doi not in example_cache.access_times > assert isinstance(backup_cache.get(doi), Response) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance(<Response [200]>, Response) E + where <Response [200]> = get('10.1016/j.jns.2020.116832') E + where get = <unpywall.cache.UnpywallCache object at 0x10554f150>.get
tests/test_cache.py:69: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_query
testcase.failure:
self = Unpywall = def test_query(self, Unpywall): > df = Unpywall.query(query='test', is_oa=True, errors='ignore') tests/test_unpywall.py:102: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ unpywall/__init__.py:203: in query data = Unpywall.get_json(query=query, is_oa=is_oa, errors=errors) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ unpywall/__init__.py:338: in get_json return r.json() ^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/httpx/_models.py:832: in json return jsonlib.loads(self.content, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = s = '\n\n500 Internal Server Error\n

Internal Server Error

\n

The ser...nd was unable to complete your request. Either the server is overloaded or there is an error in the application.

\n' idx = 0 def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0): """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended. This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may have extraneous data at the end. """ try: obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx) except StopIteration as err: > raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0) /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: JSONDecodeError

testcase.name: test_get_json
testcase.failure:
self = Unpywall = def test_get_json(self, Unpywall): with pytest.raises(HTTPStatusError): # Changed from HTTPError Unpywall.get_json(doi='a bad doi', errors='raise') with pytest.warns(UserWarning): Unpywall.get_json(doi='a bad doi', errors='ignore') assert isinstance(Unpywall.get_json(doi='10.1016/j.tmaid.2020.101663', errors='raise'), dict) > assert isinstance(Unpywall.get_json(query='test', is_oa=True, errors='raise'), dict) tests/test_unpywall.py:119: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ unpywall/__init__.py:338: in get_json return r.json() ^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/httpx/_models.py:832: in json return jsonlib.loads(self.content, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = s = '\n\n500 Internal Server Error\n

Internal Server Error

\n

The ser...nd was unable to complete your request. Either the server is overloaded or there is an error in the application.

\n' idx = 0 def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0): """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended. This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may have extraneous data at the end. """ try: obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx) except StopIteration as err: > raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0) /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: JSONDecodeError

testcase.name: test_download_pdf_file

failure.message: TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_unpywall.TestUnpywall object at 0x105544c50> Unpywall = <class 'unpywall.Unpywall'> capfd = <_pytest.capture.CaptureFixture object at 0x10570ad50>
def test_download_pdf_file(self, Unpywall, capfd):
filename = 'test.pdf' filepath = './test_dir'
> Unpywall.download_pdf_file('10.1038/nature12373', filename=filename, filepath=filepath, progress=True)
tests/test_unpywall.py:162: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
doi = '10.1038/nature12373', filename = 'test.pdf', filepath = './test_dir' progress = True
@staticmethod def download_pdf_file(doi: str, filename: str, filepath: str = '.', progress: bool = False) -> None: """ This function downloads a PDF from a given DOI.
Parameters ---------- doi : str The DOI of the requested paper. filename : str The filename for the PDF. filepath : str The path to store the downloaded PDF. progress : bool Whether the progress of the API call should be printed out or not. """
url = Unpywall.get_pdf_link(doi) > r = httpx.get(url, stream=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'stream'
unpywall/__init__.py:495: TypeError
